query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `drug_lens` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `scientific_name` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `trade_name` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `price` varchar(100),
  `pharmacological_action` longtext,
  `black_box_warning` longtext,
  `uses` longtext,
  `pregnancy_category` varchar(50),
  `standard_dose` longtext,
  `adjusted_dose` longtext,
  `neonatal_dose` longtext,
  `dose_source` longtext,
  `contraindicated_interactions` longtext,
  `major_interactions` longtext,
  `moderate_interactions` longtext,
  `minor_interactions` longtext,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  INDEX `idx_drug_lens_sci_name` (`scientific_name`),
  INDEX `idx_drug_lens_trade_name` (`trade_name`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
